'''Mon Cal Defenses''' was a weapons and defense systems manufacturer that contracted its services to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They produced the [[Mini-Torpedo Launcher]].
